title: Simulation: Digital Spend
perfectScoreMsg: You got {{score}} out of {{total}} scenarios correct! You're mastering digital spending strategies!
lowScoreMsg: You got {{score}} out of {{total}} scenarios correct. Remember to track and plan your digital expenses!
lessonLabel: Lesson: Always track your digital spending and plan expenses to stay within budget!
tipLabel: Tip: Plan your digital expenses and track them regularly to maintain financial health!

scenarios.title: Subscription Trap
scenarios.description: You have ₹1000. Multiple apps offer free trials then ₹300/month. What’s smart?

options.text: Sign up for all trials blindly
Check app value, subscribe only if useful
Avoid all digital services
Auto-renew all trials to avoid missing benefits

scenarios.title: Impulse Purchase Challenge
scenarios.description: You see a cool gadget online for ₹700, wallet has ₹1000. What’s smart?

options.text: Review need vs budget, wait 24 hrs
Buy immediately for fun
Borrow extra money to buy it
Ignore it completely, even if useful later

scenarios.title: Digital Gift Dilemma
scenarios.description: Friend asks for ₹500 gift via an app. Wallet has ₹800. What’s smart?

options.text: Send without thinking, just to please
Ignore request completely
Borrow to give more than wallet
Check budget, balance social kindness & savings

scenarios.title: Online Game Coins
scenarios.description: Game offers ₹100 coins pack for ₹200. Wallet ₹1000. How to act wisely?

options.text: Buy as many as possible
Avoid games completely
Set limit, buy only if fun + affordable
Borrow money to buy more coins

scenarios.title: Digital Privacy Spending
scenarios.description: App wants ₹500 for premium feature but requires all personal data. Wallet ₹1200. Decision?

options.text: Pay without reading terms
Check privacy, decide if worth it
Never pay for anything digital
Share unnecessary data for convenience
